data.title: Powering Low-Carbon Mining: Sungrow Unveils Mining Microgrid Power Solutions White Paper
data.description: In Hefei, China on April 28, 2026, Sungrow, a top provider of PV inverters and energy storage systems, unveiled a white paper on mining microgrid power solutions in collaboration with TÜV Rheinland and China Electrotechnical Society during the Global Renewable Energy Summit (GRES). This event is significant in the renewable energy industry and demonstrates Sungrow's commitment to innovation and sustainability. The company's partnership with renowned organizations highlights the importance of developing efficient energy solutions for the mining sector.

data.title: Oil prices surge as US-Iran talks stall. President Trump unhappy with Iran's offer on Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: Investors analyzed reports stating that President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with Iran's recent proposal regarding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: eDreams ODIGEO Exceeds Subscriber Growth Target by 5% and Reaches 7.9 Million Prime Members
data.description: In Spain, eDreams ODIGEO (eDO) has announced an operating update on Prime membership growth for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026. The company, listed on BME: EDR and OTC: EDDRF, is a prominent travel subscription firm. The focus of this update is on Prime subscriber expansion. The comprehensive financial results for fiscal year 2026 will be revealed during the standard earnings cycle at the typical timing. eDO surpassed its annual subscriber target.

data.title: Establishment of a new subsidiary of the group
data.description: Pro Kapital Grupp has revealed that its subsidiary, AS Tondi Kvartal, has formed a new subsidiary named OÜ Musketäri Majad. The primary focus of this new entity will be on constructing both residential and non-residential buildings.

Reports in Russia: 'A paramedic from Kursk and her husband were killed in an attack by the Ukrainian Armed Forces on a checkpoint in the Belgorod region. Their 16-year-old son was injured, Hinstein reported.'

data.title: Interim Report for the period 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the Board of Directors at Tivoli A/S approved the Interim Report for the period from January 1 to March 31, 2026. The summer season at Tivoli commenced on March 27, which is earlier compared to the previous year when it started on April 4. This change in opening dates has had a noticeable impact on the results for the period.

data.title: Sea Limited to Report First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Singapore-based Sea Limited (NYSE: SE) has scheduled the release of its Q1 2026 financial results for May 12, 2026, before the U.S. market opens. The Company will conduct a conference call to discuss the results, with a live webcast accessible on its website. The webcast is set for 7:30 AM U.S. Eastern Time on May 12, 2026, which translates to 7:30 PM Singapore/Hong Kong Time.
